create_date.description: The date when the SAML provider was created.

id.description: The unique identifier for the SAML provider.

name.description: The name given to the SAML provider.

saml_metadata_document.description: The XML document containing the SAML provider's metadata.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the SAML provider.

valid_until.description: The date until which the SAML provider is valid.
